description:
• Developed clean, efficient, and maintainable code utilizing the Django framework to build robust web applications.
  • Integrated third-party APIs and services to extend application functionality and improve user experience.
  • Optimized application performance, significantly reducing API response times and enhancing overall efficiency.
  • Identified, debugged, and resolved complex technical issues, ensuring smooth and seamless application functionality.
  • Managed and optimized MySQL stored procedures and queries, ensuring efficient data retrieval and system performance.
  • Improved existing API endpoints by implementing pagination and optimizing SQL queries to minimize server load and database hits.

achievements.title: API Performance Optimization
achievements.problem: High API response times reaching >3s, causing user-facing delays.
investigative_approach: Monitored slow-endpoints to pinpoint inefficient queries and subqueries.
Analyzed database execution plans using EXPLAIN ANALYZE to identify bottle-necking queries.
Identified latency issues caused by geographical distance between AWS RDS instance and backend application server.
solution: Implemented pagination and refactored SQL queries.
ORM query optimization avoided N+1 issue using select_related and prefetch_related.
Change AWS RDS region closer to backend application server.
impact: Reduced average API response times by 30%-80% and significantly improved system throughput, response time.
Improvement in SEO faster page load

achievements.title: Asynchronous Task Processing with Celery & Redis
achievements.problem: High API response times > 5s to 30s and frequent timeouts caused by synchronous processing of heavy tasks like email notifications and report generation/ compute files during the request-response cycle.
investigative_approach: Profiled API endpoints to identify 'bottleneck' operations that didn't require immediate user feedback.
Detected that SMTP handshakes and notification logic were blocking the main execution thread.
solution: Decoupled time-consuming tasks from the request-response cycle using Celery and Redis as a message broker.
Distributed asynchronous tasks (Email, Notifications, Data Processing) to dedicated Celery workers.
Refactored views to return immediate 202 Accepted status while tasks processed in the background.
impact: Reduced average API response times from several seconds to milliseconds for core transactions.
Achieved a 90% reduction in request timeouts and significantly improved UI responsiveness.
Enhanced system scalability by allowing background workers to scale independently of the web server.

achievements.title: Payment Integration & Pay-to-Post & Post-and-Pay-Later Workflow
achievements.problem: The platform was restricted to a free-use model, lacking a revenue stream and a secure method for handling financial transactions for job postings.
solution: Architected a 'Pay-to-Post' & 'Post-and-Pay-Later' workflow, transforming the database schema from a flat structure to hybrid-transaction-based model.
Integrated ConnectIPS API using secure digital signatures (HMAC) and request validation to handle nearly real-time payment confirmations.

Implemented 'Webhooks' and 'Success/Failure' callback handlers to verify payment, notify Customer Service Representative to activate job listings and notify customer about success of payment with virtual invoice.
Manual reconciliation and fallback mechanism to handle edge-case verification failures (e.g., network timeouts or webhook drops), ensuring transaction integrity and preventing data loss.
impact: Enabled the platform's first revenue stream, successfully processing hundreds of transactions within the few month.
Automated the payment process, reducing administrative overhead on job listings and payment tracking.

description:
• Managed MySQL and PostgreSQL databases and wrote queries to extract meaningful insights.
  • Built dynamic web applications using Laravel and CodeIgniter.
  • Created responsive and user-friendly interfaces using React.js.
  • Collaborated with the system department to optimize deployment.
  • Implemented Python scripts for cron jobs and automation tasks.

achievements.title: Attendance Device Integration & Modernization (Legacy Migration)
achievements.problem: The existing .NET-based service was incompatible with new attendance hardware, resulting in legacy system obsolete.
investigative_approach: Performed a technical audit of the legacy .NET service to identify incompatibilities with modern attendance device firmware.
Reverse-engineered the old dotnet script was not working for new devices.
Research on new third party library that use pooling technique to extract data from attendance device
solution: Developed a modern, high-performance Python-based polling service to replace the .NET legacy system.
Implemented a system service to support attendance device, ensuring older hardware compatibility.
impact: Successfully migrated attendance tracking from legacy script to a modern, Python solution with 100% hardware compatibility.
Eliminated the need for manual data reconciliation, ensuring the AMS always reflects real-time attendance data.

achievements.title: Resource and Project Tracking & Payroll Reporting
achievements.problem: Accounting, HR, and Management teams lacked a unified reporting tool to track billable hours, resource allocation, and project time, relying on manual spreadsheet processes.
investigative_approach: Analyzed business requirements provided by management to define the logic for project tracking and resource utilization tracking.
Audited the existing database schema to ensure all necessary time-tracking, project, and employee data points were available for reporting.
solution: Developed optimized SQL queries to aggregate project and resource data, ensuring accuracy for financial payroll processes.
Implemented server-side filtering and pagination within a Laravel Lumen reporting to handle data efficiently.
Built a React-based frontend tabular dashboard that visualizes resource allocation and project hours for multiple departments, projects etc.
impact: Transformed manual reporting into an automated, reliable system, significantly reducing the time spent by the accounting department on payroll preparation.
Provided clear visibility into resource utilization, enabling management to identify unallocated resources and project bottlenecks.
Established a centralized 'Source of Truth' for project hours, improving data accuracy across HR and Finance workflows.

description:
• Planned and developed scalable system architectures.
  • Designed and developed back-end APIs with Django (DRF).
  • Implemented JWT authentication for security.
  • Analyzed data and generated reports as required.
  • Collaborated with front-end developers for seamless integration.
  • Provided guidance to junior developers on backend practices.

• Worked with Django ORM, models, URLs, and views.
  • Built and tested APIs using Django Rest Framework (DRF).
  • Managed and maintained the database and codebase.
  • Implemented SQL queries for reporting and analytics.
  • Wrote Python scripts for automation tasks.
  • Assisted seniors in troubleshooting production bugs.
